name: Hawaiian Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix together the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Gently fold the wet mixture into the dry mixture.
4. Pour the batter into two greased loaf pans.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 60 minutes.
6. Makes 2 loaves.
